snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.update_plant(
        plant_id="plantId",
        request={
            "name": "Updated Venus Flytrap",
            "care": {"light": "partial shade"},
        },
    )


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.create_plant_with_schema(
    name="Sundew",
    species="Drosera capensis",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.create_plant_with_schema(
        name="Sundew",
        species="Drosera capensis",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
